query: help me explore this repository — I'm not sure whether I need an architecture map or docs yet, walk me through the options
map this codebase for a new maintainer: entry points, major components, and how requests move through it
trace the submitOrder flow from the HTTP handler through persistence and cite every file you rely on
where is refreshToken defined, who calls it, and what tests would be affected if its return type changed?
give me the blast radius of changing the queue retry policy in this repo; don't edit code
audit our developer docs against the current code and tell me which claims are stale or unsupported
update ARCHITECTURE.md so it accurately explains the current worker and queue boundaries, based on cited source
understand the auth subsystem first, then refresh the contributor documentation for it
document this repository, but ask me what kind of codebase documentation would actually be useful before writing
compare README setup commands with the manifests and lockfiles, then fix only the inaccurate documentation
what should we improve next in this repo? audit bugs, security, performance, and tech debt and rank the work
the login handler throws a 500 for unicode passwords; reproduce, diagnose, and fix it
implement the fully specified /healthz endpoint and add tests
I want some kind of sharing feature but don't know the requirements; help me decide what to build
bootstrap a new TypeScript service with lint, tests, and project rules
review PR 81 for correctness and leave inline comments
write API documentation for my consulting company website; there is no software repository
install CodeGraph globally and configure its MCP server
make an implementation plan from specs/014-healthz/spec.md; the requirements are ready
